title: NPC Autopilot
description: Foundry VTT NPC combat autopilot for D&D 5e. v3.9.0: NPC Vision (line-of-sight) targeting, door detection & opening, wall-aware pathfinding, last-known-position fallback for hidden enemies. v3.8.4: native thrown-weapon drops. v3.8.0: Ollama Bridge AI narration. Soft dependency — safe without.
